positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic mountain range peaking through soft clouds, set against a gradient backdrop of deep sapphire blue to ethereal teal. The composition should feature a clean, scalable silhouette design, with stylized, simplified peaks and wispy, rounded cloud formations. Incorporate abstract elements like geometric leaf patterns or subtle constellations visible in the sky. Focus on high contrast and deep jewel tones, ensuring the final artwork is suitable for repeat patterns or apparel prints. Studio lighting, vector art aesthetic, high detail, perfect symmetry, centralized composition.
